name: VIVOSUN 4-in-1 Sensor, Temperature and Humidity Monitoring with CO2 and Light Detection, CO2 Data VPD Tracking for Indoor Growing, Compatible with GrowHub E42A+
notes: Combined CO2, temperature, humidity and light (PAR/lux) sensor; plugs into GrowHub E42A+ (NOT compatible with older E42); not found on Amazon.de as of search date; Amazon.com ASIN B0GXFB1ZMR
